source:
AZC=st("
Privacy Mode (Legacy)
No training and no storage. Background Agent and other features that require code storage will be disabled.")
target:
AZC=st("
隐私模式（旧版）
不训练且不存储。后台智能体和其它需要代码存储的功能将被禁用。")

source: get fallback(){return"Your code data will not be trained on or used to improve the product. We will not store your code."}

target: description:"基于最近编辑，在光标附近提供上下文感知的多行建议"

source: get description(){return Er(()=>!!s())()?"Disabled by your team admin.":r()?"Enabled by Run Everything Auto-Run Mode: Agent bypasses approval prompts for tools including Web Search.":"Skip approval dialog; Agent may run web searches automatically"}
target: get description(){return Er(()=>!!s())()?"已被你的团队管理员禁用。":r()?"已由 Run Everything 自动运行模式启用：智能体会绕过包括网页搜索在内的工具批准提示。":"跳过批准对话框；智能体可以自动运行网页搜索"}

source: get description(){return`Prevent Agent from automatically running MCP tools${l().isAdminControlled?" (controlled by admin)":""}`}
target: get description(){return`防止智能体自动运行 MCP 工具${l().isAdminControlled?"（由管理员控制）":""}`}

source: se=He(()=>{const Le=l();return Le.isDisabledByAdmin?"Auto-Run Mode Disabled by Team Admin":Le.isAdminControlled?Le.sandboxingControls?.sandboxing==="enabled"&&y()?"Auto-Run Mode Controlled by Team Admin (Sandbox Enabled)":"Auto-Run Mode Controlled by Team Admin":!Le.isAdminControlled&&e.composerEffectiveAllowlistService.shouldPermissionsFileConstrainUnrestrictedMode()?`Auto-Run Mode (enforced by ~/${e.productService.dataFolderName??".cursor"}/permissions.json)`:"Auto-Run Mode"})
target: se=He(()=>{const Le=l();return Le.isDisabledByAdmin?"自动运行模式已被团队管理员禁用":Le.isAdminControlled?Le.sandboxingControls?.sandboxing==="enabled"&&y()?"自动运行模式由团队管理员控制（沙箱已启用）":"自动运行模式由团队管理员控制":!Le.isAdminControlled&&e.composerEffectiveAllowlistService.shouldPermissionsFileConstrainUnrestrictedMode()?`自动运行模式（由 ~/${e.productService.dataFolderName??".cursor"}/permissions.json 强制执行）`:"自动运行模式"})
